ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: 76% milk chocolate (sugar, whole milk powder, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, emulsifier (soy lecithin)), 15% biscuit (wheat flour, palm oil, sunflower oil, glucose syrup, honey, sugar, salt), 8% marshmallow (sugar, glucose-fructose syrup, water, gelatin (beef), corn starch, maize starch), cocoa solids: minimum 32%.
